notes: Their main damage was Grux (24k physical); 1/5 of you itemized armor — that hurt.
Enemy ran 0/5 on or near their meta core — they were off-meta too, the win was there.

draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Cuban Noobster (midlane→carry).

notes: Spoochako (offlane) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
They traded the fight for Mini Prime across the map — you won bodies but gave the objective.
You opened it a 1-body down (4v5) — the numbers were lost before the fight was.
Xeebs (jungle) was dead — went down 36s earlier, so this was never a full-strength fight.
🎮 private (midlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 3-0 into a numbers advantage.
Willy Guggenheim (support) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.

threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~1.0s of lockdown): Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s), Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Akeron Web Lash (root 1s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
ourKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
ourKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
ourKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
ourKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

ourKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
ourKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
ourKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
ourKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Web Lash root → Crushing Maw armor shred → Hellfire eye → Consume pull-channel
ourKits.winCondition: root with Web Lash and grind with Hunger-stacked haste
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst on his rooted target
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge Web Lash — without the root he can't lock you; interrupt Consume

ourKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
ourKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
ourKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
ourKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

enemyKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
enemyKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
enemyKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
enemyKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

enemyKits.combo: Wild Rush charge → Ruthless Assault → Highland Hurl slow → Unstoppable Force cleanse ult
enemyKits.winCondition: engage Unstoppable and grind with Hersir-empowered swings
enemyKits.passive: Hersir stacks empower the next basic
enemyKits.playAgainst: save CC for after Unstoppable Force; kite her charge

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

enemyKits.combo: Stasis Bomb stun → Photon Disruptor slow → Containment Fence wall → Ion Strike slow ult
enemyKits.winCondition: lock a target with stun + fence and let the team collapse
enemyKits.passive: Rocket Boots mobility, refreshed by abilities
enemyKits.playWith: burst that converts her stun/fence into a kill
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Stasis Bomb; the fence zones — flank around it

enemyKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
enemyKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down
